Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1 RA VF AE RMI VF AD SC AC Case 2 RA VF AE AD SC AC Case 3 RA VF AE RMI RMI VF AD SC AC

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So the log shows that after Assess Eligibility sometimes there is a loop of repeating missing information and re validation Also some cases skip the additional RMI and VF

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So the process tree should capture this behavior as follows Main sequence It always starts with RA VF AE

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: In all cases after AE we see that either there is missing info and revalidation or the process goes directly to AD

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So one candidate approach Create a main sequence for the common prefix RA to VF to AE Then at the next step the behavior diverges

Name: Validation - PE
Text: For case 2 RA VF AE AD SC AC so no extra RMI or VF appears after AE

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So the process tree must allow two possibilities either you perform the loop or you skip it entirely

Name: Validation - NE
Text: But note that if we use loop operator as defined star A B then it always executes A at least once

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: However if we use a loop the first iteration always occurs But in our event log some cases do not have any RMI events after AE They go directly to AD

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 3 after AE there are two consecutive RMI events then a VF then AD

Name: Validation - PE
Text: That does not match the standard loop behavior because after first RMI instead of doing VF and repeating RMI they did another RMI immediately

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Maybe we can model it as an optional block where one or more occurrences of RMI are followed by a single VF

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: The simplest representation might be main sequence RA VF AE then optional loop then AD SC AC

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Root equals Sequence RA VF AE XOR tau LoopBlock AD SC AC

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: LoopBlock equals LOOP XOR Sequence RMI Sequence RMI RMI VF

Name: Validation - PE
Text: For case 2 after AE XOR chooses tau branch so trace becomes RA VF AE AD SC AC

Name: Validation - PE
Text: For case 1 after AE LoopBlock chosen and XOR chooses one RMI then VF so trace becomes RA VF AE RMI VF AD SC AC

Name: Validation - PE
Text: For case 3 after AE LoopBlock chosen and XOR chooses sequence RMI RMI then VF so trace becomes RA VF AE RMI RMI VF AD SC AC

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So overall final process tree structure is Sequence RA VF AE XOR tau LOOP XOR Sequence RMI Sequence RMI RMI VF AD SC AC
